name: @fajaralhakim/agent-kit
description: Stack-agnostic AI agent context installer (AGENTS.md, rules, skills, MCP)

scripts.build: bun run --filter @agent-kit/cli build && bun run --filter @agent-kit/analyzer typecheck
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @agent-kit/cli typecheck && bun run --filter @agent-kit/analyzer typecheck
